popupModalp1: This website is a demonstration project.
popupModalp2: Any information you enter {emphasis-note} is not sent to or stored on any server. The data is only used temporarily in your browser so the demo can work.
popupModalp3: The images used on this website are generated by AI and are used only for illustrative purposes. They do not represent real meals or photos.
thankYouMessage: Thanks, {customer-name}! Your order is on its way.
ratingModalQuestion: How was your experience with us?
